title: How Helix Plays
description: Four lab domains, one precise battlefield — assemble a deck, outmaneuver rivals in turn-based duels, and climb the seasonal ladder with a clean Signal.

pillars.title: Lab Tactics
pillars.description: Trade lines on a living board where timing, lane pressure, and burst windows matter more than raw stats. Win the turn before you win the match.

pillars.title: Frame Collecting
pillars.description: Pull Frames from Atrium, Reservoir, Core, and Antenna — then stitch keywords, curves, and finishers into a list that rewards precision.

pillars.title: Seasonal Ladder
pillars.description: Climb seasonal tiers, learn from losses, and refine your lines. The summit rewards players who adapt without losing the Signal.
